tree.title: Australia’s Leading Stone Supplier
tree.description: YDL Stone is a leading wholesaler and manufacturer of Crystalline Silica-Free stone, porcelain, and natural stone, delivering high-quality surfaces across Australia.

children.title: Mineral
children.description: Introducing YDL Stone’s innovative Mineral Crystalline Silica-Free surfaces, designed with precision and cutting-edge aesthetics. This collection reflects our commitment to providing high-quality, safe, and sustainable solutions for modern spaces.

children.title: Builder Range
children.description: Crystalline Silica Free. Explore the essentials with our Builder Range, featuring a selection of classic whites, greys, blacks, and speckled designs. This collection is perfect for those looking to create a foundation that balances simplicity and versatility. Whether you’re designing for residential or commercial spaces, these surfaces provide timeless options that can adapt to various styles and needs. From clean, minimal looks to textures that add depth, the Builder Range offers reliable and enduring choices for any project.

children.title: Classic White
children.description: A pristine white backdrop adorned with understated grey speckles, exuding timeless sophistication and versatile elegance. Perfect for elevating any space with a touch of refined charm.

children.title: Jasmine
children.description: Jasmine stone brings a touch of terrazzo charm in a smaller, more intricate style. With its delicate specks, it offers a modern take on a classic design, adding subtle elegance to any space with ease.

children.title: Mondo Sand
children.description: Meet our stunning mid-grey benchtop, adorned with delicate speckles reminiscent of stardust. A timeless addition to any space, exuding subtle elegance with every glance.

children.title: Silver Star White
children.description: A crisp white stone featuring delicate polished aluminium speckles that shimmer subtly across the surface. Its refined texture adds depth and visual interest, making it a versatile choice for any space.

children.title: Star Burst
children.description: Star Burst is a bright white stone with delicate mirror flecks, creating a subtle shimmer and contemporary appeal.

children.title: Deluxe Range
children.description: Crystalline Silica Free. Our Deluxe Range presents a refined selection of versatile tones, featuring a carefully curated palette of greys, beiges, creams, and whites. This collection is designed to bring lasting elegance to any space, offering sophisticated options that enhance a variety of design styles. Whether you’re looking for a soft, neutral backdrop or a subtle touch of warmth, the Deluxe Range ensures a timeless, elegant finish that complements both modern and classic interiors.

children.title: Arctic White
children.description: A crisp, pure white stone that serves as a clean and versatile foundation, bringing a fresh and modern touch to any space.

children.title: Sabia
children.description: Sabia stone showcases a refined grey-brown hue with delicate broken white veins, adding a subtle yet distinctive touch to its natural appeal.

children.title: Smokey Grey
children.description: A sophisticated stone with a grey base adorned by subtle, broken veins, creating a captivating contrast and adding depth to its elegant design.

children.title: Rosemee
children.description: Rosemee features a soft cream base with gentle splashes of light grey, creating a beautifully subtle and organic movement. Its delicate tones add warmth and versatility, making it a perfect choice for a refined and inviting space.

children.title: Semento
children.description: Semento captures the classic look of concrete in a beige-grey color scheme, offering timeless style for any setting.

children.title: Fresco
children.description: An understated beige foundation with subtle hints of grey, creating an ambiance of ultimate minimalism for a refined aesthetic.

children.title: Premium Range
children.description: Crystalline Silica Free. Explore the timeless elegance of our Premium Range, featuring delicate veins and distinctive designs that showcase the quality of YDL’s Mineral-Crystalline Silica-Free stone products. This collection offers a refined selection of patterns and textures that bring both style and practicality to any space. Designed with durability and aesthetic appeal in mind, the Premium Range strikes the perfect balance for those seeking sophistication with everyday functionality. Ideal for a variety of applications, it delivers lasting beauty without compromising performance.

children.title: Shadow Grey
children.description: A soft grey base with random brown-grey streaks flowing gently across the stone, creating a natural and elegant effect.

children.title: Acqua Mare
children.description: A traditional look with fine veining touched by movement of soft shadows over a misty white base.

children.title: Cloudy Grey
children.description: Introducing Cloudy Grey: a stone of gentle sophistication, with its light grey neutral base adorned by random, subtle veins, adding a touch of organic charm to any space.

children.title: Kalala Bianco
children.description: Mimicking popular marbling colours and effects, this is a timeless piece that will add value and charm to a designer room.

children.title: Misty Dusk
children.description: Subtle Sophistication: Embrace the timeless allure of delicate white vein motifs on a beige canvas.

children.title: Premium Plus Range
children.description: cRYSTALLINE sILICA fREE. Experience the understated elegance of our Premium Plus Range, showcasing bold designs and exquisite veining that redefine luxury. This collection offers stunning patterns, from Calacatta-inspired styles to striking swirl effects, all crafted to perfection. The Premium Plus Range brings both visual impact and lasting durability, making it the ultimate choice for those seeking a blend of sophistication and high performance. Elevate your space with the unparalleled beauty and exceptional quality that this range delivers.

children.title: Giusto
children.description: A beautiful subtle vein on a white base polish finish that creates an light grey undertone, making this surface perfect for any project space possible.

children.title: Calacatta Azuro
children.description: Inspired by Calacatta marble, our Calacatta Azuro features a crisp white base with swirling mist-like veining, creating an elegant and timeless look.

children.title: Calacatta Classico
children.description: Inspired by Calacatta marble, a pure white base is dominated by free flowing light-grey veins in varying volumes throughout the stone.

children.title: Calacatta Combo
children.description: Inspired by Calacatta marble, Calacatta Combo has long thin dark brown and grey veins that branch diagonally through the piece. The design is striking and resilient, and makes for a great centerpiece and wow factor in the home.

children.title: Aurum White
children.description: The Aurum White is a timeless stone with a sequence of dark grey ashes that is controlled by the movement mist and waves. This lively palette will bring designer style into your kitchen, bathrooms and other interior surfaces as well as enhances the overall aesthetic of your home.

children.title: Angel Falls
children.description: Offering a timeless allure our Angel falls features stormy like veins with subtle grey capillaries that flow across the white grey background. This stone can be paired with any style and be the focal point of your home.

children.title: Summer Breeze
children.description: Soft warm grey veins whisp gently across the full slab in cool fresh tones of grey and white. Perfect for that subtle marble look with versatility in the multi tonal background.

children.title: Nuvola Snow
children.description: Nuvola Stone features a delicate light grey background adorned with gently flowing, white wave-like patterns. These subtle, ocean-inspired waves create a sense of tranquility and harmony, making it an elegant and soothing addition to any space.

children.title: Ultimate Range
children.description: Crystalline Silica Free. Step into a world of luxury with our Ultimate Range. This collection offers a stunning variety of high-end styles that bring sophistication and unmatched quality to any space. Whether you’re aiming for a bold statement or subtle elegance, the Ultimate Range has everything you need to elevate your design with refined style and premium finishes.

children.title: Golden Striato
children.description: Inspired by the natural beauty of travertine, featuring a warm beige base with soft golden linear veining. The delicate veining flows evenly across the surface, creating a seamless visual continuity. Its refined finish and consistent structure highlight the perfect balance of natural texture and tonal harmony.

children.title: Astoria
children.description: Introducing the captivating Astoria which entails striking bold veins on a glossy white background. The magic of this stone lies in its exquisite detail, as delicate threads of gold glitter are intricately infused within the dark veins. This marbled like pattern is perfect for those wanting a touch of Italian luxury.

children.title: Statuario Enzo
children.description: The Statuario Enzo embodies a serene of white and light grey tones, featuring delicate veins throughout the stone, creating an elegant yet calming atmosphere.

children.title: Cumulus Cloud
children.description: A tranquil cloud-like pattern of swirling grey and white crystalline quartz floating in a light toned base. With its beautiful variations of neutral blended tones and subtle patterning it offers great versatility for a large range of design styles.

children.title: Jade Sky
children.description: A textured, velvety soft cool grey background accented with a deep, stormy, cloud like pattern in icy shades of grey and white to bring the perfect edgy look into your application.

children.title: Bella Oro – NEW
children.description: Features a clean white base, enriched by flowing golden veining that moves confidently across the surface. The warm gold tones add contrast and definition, creating a sense of movement and visual depth.

children.title: Blanco Verona
children.description: With its brilliant white base and striking grey free flowing veins, this Italian inspired stone will become the hero wherever it is placed inside the home. This bold colour has the whitest base available in our ranges making it very popular in many applications.

children.title: Chantilly
children.description: Inspired from the Carrara region of Italy this stone features, a white cool background with contrasting grey veining’s across the piece. Flaunting the look of marble in an effortless quartz design, the stone offers a timeless yet modern look for any project.

children.title: Venatino
children.description: Venatino boasts a warm white base with delicate deep blue veins, featuring defined grey lines that enhance its marble-like elegance, making it a perfect choice for refined spaces.

children.title: Ice Drift
children.description: A cool, white background with ultra soft, pale grey, calacatta style larger veins blended with fine subtle warm toned veins that gracefully drift across the surface showcasing elegance at its best.

children.title: Vene Rose
children.description: A stunning display of timeless elegance. It’s warm white base is adorned with meandering brown veins, each one uniquely random, evoking a sense of pure bliss in every glance.

children.title: Special Edition Range
children.description: Crystalline silica free. Introducing the Special Edition Range, our highest-tier collection, where elegance meets exclusivity. Inspired by the beauty of natural stone, this range features intricate patterns and complex textures. Designed to meet the diverse needs of both residential and commercial spaces, the Special Edition Range offers exceptional beauty and versatility for any project.

children.title: Blanco Divino
children.description: A perfectly sophisticated and unique stone design, that has an elegant and elaborate soft white base with intricate grey patterning cascading across the entire surface.

children.title: Supernova
children.description: Inspired by Brazilian quartzite Super White. Our Supernova offers a beautiful warm grey background exquisitely mimicking a modern concrete stone surface. The flowing dusk vein patterns, perfectly adds an exclusive and timeless feeling and brings style to any interior.

children.title: Alpana Ash
children.description: Alpana Ash features cool grey and subtle white tones with marble like characteristics over a grey background. The swirl patterning helps create depth and texture and adds to its striking appearance.

children.title: Luca Del Mare
children.description: Luca Del Mare features a serene grey-blue base, adorned with intricate crackle patterns that evoke the fluid movement of ocean waves. The fine, fissured texture flows across the surface, adding depth and natural rhythm to the stone.

children.title: Mahal Ivory
children.description: Inspired by the natural marble of the Taj Mahal. Our Mahal Ivory is a captivating masterpiece that has a blend of golden,cream and brown hues, with pristine streak patterns flowing throughout the slab. It’s intricate pattern evokes the undulating dunes of the desert landscape, creating an ambiance that’s both luxurious and serene.

children.title: Super Arabescato
children.description: Inspired by Calacatta marble, Super Arabescato features a white marble base with soft grey veining. The elegant veins flow evenly across the surface, creating a refined and harmonious appearance. Its polished finish and delicate texture highlight the natural movement of the stone, offering a balanced and timeless aesthetic.

children.title: Eos Illumina – NEW
children.description: Eos Illumina features a cream base with subtle beige gradient tones. The soft colour transitions create a smooth and harmonious flow across the surface. Delicate crackle patterns add texture, while its translucent quality allows light to beautifully interact with the stone.

children.title: Porcelain
children.description: YDL Porcelain combines style and durability, offering a versatile range for both indoor and outdoor spaces. Ideal for applications like benchtops, splashbacks, and facades, our porcelain is strong, low-maintenance, and available in a variety of designs. Explore the perfect balance of beauty and functionality with YDL Porcelain.

children.title: Category 1
children.description: Porcelain. Our primary Porcelain slabs feature surface-level patterns that exude elegance, with a smooth texture and a timeless appeal. These patterns are visible only on the surface, creating a conventional aesthetic. The design does not run through the body of the slab, offering a clean and sophisticated look perfect for various design styles. Whether for residential or commercial applications, this category provides a refined, versatile surface that stands the test of time.

children.title: P100 – Whitewash
children.description: Discover the pristine white canvas that conveys the essence of authentic porcelain bisque. Delivered in a minimalist, neutral style, it lets in natural brightness to take the centre of the canvas.

children.title: P101 – Black Noir
children.description: A jet black stone with a sleek and minimalist allure.

children.title: P102 – Rustico
children.description: Uncover the concrete-porcelain blend: a light, textured surface resembling fresh cement, with grey grains and an ultra-rough finish.

children.title: P103 – Ivory Travertine
children.description: The Ivory Travertine is a warm creamy beige sand tone that transforms the textural presence of weathered stones, creating a natural toned effect quietly building a minimal design in layers of elegant simplicity.

children.title: P105 – Babylon
children.description: Babylon exhibits an exquisite blend of soft whites, dusty greys, browns, and rust color that swirl together in a timeless marble pattern.

children.title: P106 – Everest White
children.description: This stone has a snowy white background with prominent grey Calacatta veins flowing throughout it, giving it a striking and elegant look.

children.title: P108 – Vena Marquina
children.description: Uncover our exquisite black porcelain, infused with arbitrary, vivid white veins, creating a striking and elegant modern aesthetic.

children.title: Category 2
children.description: Porcelain. YDL introduces an exclusive range with full-body vein technology, setting a new standard in porcelain design. Unlike traditional porcelain, where the pattern is only visible on the surface, this innovative technology integrates the veining throughout the entire body of the slab. As a result, when cut, the veins continue to flow seamlessly, offering an authentic, continuous aesthetic that closely resembles natural stone.

children.title: P200 – Sempre Statuario
children.description: Experience the elegance of a pure white background adorned with dynamic grey veining. From bold, dramatic strokes accent by heavier tones to subtle wisps of soft greys delicately etched into the backdrop, our design offers a reined and versatile aesthetic.

children.title: P201 – Infinity Calacatta
children.description: The canvas predominantly features a pristine white background embellished with bold light grey accent veins. These beautiful Calacatta veins exhibit a diverse range of volumes, with some parts being bold and others soft.

children.title: P202 – Lago Oro
children.description: Discover the elegance of our ivory based porcelain stone, enriched with intricate white charcoal engravings and subtle copper accents, achieving the timeless beauty of marble.

children.title: P203 – Sempre Grigio
children.description: Uncover the rich dark grey base with contrasting white veins creating a captivating impact.

children.title: Natural
children.description: Our natural stone collection embodies a commitment to excellence, with each slab handpicked from the world’s finest quarries. We source premium Marble, Dolomite, Granite, Limestone, Quartzite, and Travertine directly from select locations in Brazil, Italy, Turkey, Greece, and India. Every piece reflects the unique beauty and craftsmanship of its origin, bringing rich heritage and exceptional quality to your space.

children.title: Dolomite
children.description: Natural Stone. Introducing Dolomite, a natural stone that effortlessly combines elegance and durability. Featuring soft veining and a balanced mix of light and dark hues, Dolomite brings a sophisticated touch to any design. Perfect for countertops, vanities, flooring, and wall panels, this versatile stone is ideal for both residential and commercial applications. With its exceptional strength and timeless appeal, Dolomite enhances spaces with lasting style and functionality.

children.title: Austral Dream
children.description: Quarried in Australia, Austral Dream Dolomite showcases a warm beige base with striking, irregular grey veining that flows naturally across each slab. Its honed finish enhances the stone’s texture, adding depth and character to any space. Ideal for kitchen benchtops, bathroom vanities, splashbacks, or feature walls, Austral Dream Dolomite brings the essence of the Australian landscape into your home, combining rugged beauty with versatile design appeal.

specifications.Availability: Stock available in VIC & NSW & QLD

children.title: Super White
children.description: This honed Super White Dolomite from Brazil boasts a striking pattern with layers of smoky grey tones and bold, flowing veining. The interplay of dark and light greys gives it a rich, textured look, while the honed finish provides a soft, matte surface. With its dramatic and refined character, Super White Dolomite brings depth and elegance to any space, making it an ideal choice for a sophisticated statement piece.

specifications.Availability: Stock available in VIC & NSW & QLD

children.title: Granite
children.description: Natural stone. Introducing Granite, a natural stone celebrated for its strength and enduring beauty. Characterised by its unique mineral patterns and rich tonal variations, Granite offers a refined yet resilient surface suited to a wide range of design applications. Ideal for benchtops, splashbacks, vanities, and feature walls, it performs beautifully in both residential and commercial settings. With its hard-wearing nature and timeless visual appeal, Granite delivers lasting style and practical elegance to any space.

children.title: Absolute Black
children.description: Originating from India, Absolute Black is a high-quality granite available in both leathered and polished finishes. Its deep, uniform black tone offers a bold, timeless look that enhances a range of interior and exterior design styles.

specifications.Availability: Stock available in VIC & NSW & QLD

children.title: Black Fusion
children.description: Quarried from Brazil, Black Fusion Granite features a deep black base layered with flowing gold and white veining that moves organically across the surface. The polished finish enhances its contrast and depth, revealing subtle sand-like textures when viewed up close. Bold yet refined, this granite makes a striking choice for kitchen benchtops, islands and feature applications, adding movement and visual interest to both modern and classic spaces.

children.title: Colonial White
children.description: Colonia White Granite is quarried from India and features a soft grey base scattered with fine black speckles, giving it subtle texture and depth. Available in both leathered and polished finishes, it brings a refined, tactile quality to any surface. Perfect for benchtops, walls, flooring, or outdoor areas, Colonia White balances durability with understated elegance, making it a practical yet stylish choice for modern spaces.

children.title: Grandee

children.title: Steel Grey
children.description: Steel Grey granite, originating from India, is available in a polished finish and features a rich, deep charcoal grey surface with subtle flecks of lighter tones scattered throughout, reminiscent of a starry night sky or the texture of brushed steel. Its sleek, reflective surface adds a modern, industrial feel, while the muted grey tones keep it versatile for a variety of design styles. Steel Grey is a perfect fit for contemporary homes or spaces seeking a minimalist, clean aesthetic, where its understated elegance can shine.

children.title: Titanium
children.description: Quarried in Brazil, Titanium Granite is a bold natural stone defined by its deep black base, enriched with flowing white and gold crystallisations. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, and outdoor applications where a sophisticated statement is desired.

children.title: Viscount White
children.description: Viscount White Originating from India, Viscount White granite is available in both polished and leathered finishes, blending soft white and grey tones with bold dark veins that flow across the surface like moving water. The polished finish provides a sleek, refined look, while the leathered option introduces a more natural, organic texture. This versatile stone enhances both contemporary and classic home styles with its subtle yet striking visual appeal.

children.title: Limestone
children.description: Natural Stone. Introducing Limestone, a natural stone known for its soft, earthy tones and organic texture. With its subtle patterns and warm colour palette, Limestone adds a sense of calm and natural beauty to any environment. Ideal for wall cladding, flooring, and vanities, this versatile material suits both contemporary and classic designs. Limestone’s timeless charm and gentle character make it a popular choice for creating inviting, refined spaces.

children.title: Tundra Grey
children.description: From the quarries of Turkey, Tundra Grey Limestone showcases a beautiful mix of soft greys, ranging from light to mid-grey, with delicate, cloud-like patterns flowing naturally across the surface. Its honed finish creates a smooth, matte texture that highlights the stone’s natural beauty, offering an understated yet refined elegance. The subtle blend of grey’s brings a calming, serene vibe to any space, making it a versatile option for both contemporary and classic designs.

children.title: Marble
children.description: Natural stone. Marble is a timeless natural stone prized for its luxurious appearance and unique veining. Formed through metamorphic processes, it offers a smooth, refined texture and a rich palette of colours—from crisp whites and soft greys to deep blacks and warm neutrals. Known for its elegance and individuality, marble is ideal for benchtops, vanities, wall cladding, and feature elements. Its natural beauty and lasting appeal make it a standout choice for residential and commercial projects alike.

children.title: Ariston Kalliston
children.description: Ariston Kalliston is defined by its clean white background, gently intersected by soft grey veining that adds a natural sense of fluidity and depth. Originating from Greece, this marble’s delicate movement creates a calm, inviting atmosphere, reminiscent of soft clouds or flowing water. Its honed finish provides a smooth, matte surface, which complements a variety of design aesthetics. This marble is well suited for those looking to enhance their space with a refined and modern touch, effortlessly brightening interiors and pairing seamlessly with lighter tones and neutral cabinetry.

children.title: Breccia Aurora

The stone’s tonal complexity lends it a distinctive character, bold yet refined, making it a striking choice for benchtops, bathrooms or feature walls. Breccia Pernice brings a sense of quiet drama to spaces that call for colour, movement and individuality.

Highly regarded in premium design, Calacatta Borghini is often selected for kitchen benchtops, bathroom vanities, feature walls and statement surfaces where the beauty of natural marble can truly stand out. Its distinctive pattern and refined colour palette allow it to pair effortlessly with both contemporary and classic design styles.
